author: @wolcamophone4783
text:
I don’t wanna be that obligatory guy who says “this video is perfect,” so I’ll break it down just analyzing the fight scene which I think everyone remembers.

It starts off seeming like any other Skyrim mod splurge video, but then it hits you with the “surprise werewolf attack, I should’ve seen this coming.” Then the bear shows up with the music and the Macho Men drag out the party until Dunkey is in a delirium where he peers into his own future briefly before he has a meltdown and experiences true ego death, asking “am I still exist?” But just as his being is about to wither into the rest of the chaos, he comes back in a second wind with the lightsaber like “Now you gotta fight me! YEEEEAAAGH!” Then it just ends with monocle crab and Master Chef.

Point is there are a lot of key points here that obviously have a loft of Kraft to them which makes this truly memorable comedy.
